global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with a central content area highlighting the main message.

elements.label: Solid orange background
elements.description: A vibrant solid orange background fills the entire canvas, providing a warm and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: Content area
elements.description: A central rectangular area with a light orange hue, featuring abstract shapes that suggest media content.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one square, in a lighter shade of orange, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Overlay shapes
elements.description: Additional abstract shapes in the background, subtly enhancing the design without overpowering the main content.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Binge starts now' with a smaller tagline 'New hits every week' underneath, prominently displayed in the center.
elements.text_content: Binge starts now New hits every week

elements.label: PulsePlay logo
elements.description: The logo 'PulsePlay' appears at the top in a bold, modern font, contrasting against the orange background.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with the text 'Shop now' in white, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label in the top corner marked 'UGC' in white, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, main message about binge-worthy content.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is positioned at the top, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Binge starts now, New hits every week, PulsePlay, Shop now, UGC
